basic_details.job_title: IIM Bangalore Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore)
basic_details.post_name: Academic Associate - Production & Operations Management Area
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIM Bangalore) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Academic Associate - Production & Operations Management Area Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Economics, Statistics, Business Analytics or Industrial Engineering/ Operations Research or closely related fields; additionally, an MBA or Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) which is equivalent to master's degree from reputed business schools will also be considered.
qualification.details: Master's degree in Economics, Statistics, Business Analytics or Industrial Engineering/ Operations Research or closely related fields. MBA or Post Graduate Diploma in Management (PGDM) from reputed business schools. Long-term interest in doctoral program and engaging in teaching and research.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application Further process not specified
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Bangalore Academic Associate - Production & Operations Management Area Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Bangalore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Bangalore Academic Associate - Production & Operations Management Area Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Bangalore Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Bangalore Academic Associate - Production & Operations Management Area Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Bangalore Academic Associate - Production & Operations Management Area Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Bangalore to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Bangalore Academic Associate - Production & Operations Management Area Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Associate position at IIM Bangalore?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Academic Associate position at IIM Bangalore is July 30, 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Economics, Statistics, Business Analytics, Industrial Engineering, or Operations Research. An MBA or PGDM from a reputed business school is also considered equivalent.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Academic Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Academic Associate position ranges from ₹43,000/- to ₹55,000/- per month, depending on the candidate's experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Academic Associate - Production & Operations Management Area position at IIM Bangalore.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to fill out the application form through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their applications. Further details regarding the selection process are not specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Does IIM Bangalore offer a contract position for Academic Associates?
faq.answer: Yes, the Academic Associate position at IIM Bangalore is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is IIMB/HR/RECT/2026/42.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any specific experience requirements for this role?
faq.answer: While specific years of experience are not detailed, candidates are expected to have a long-term interest in doctoral programs and engaging in teaching and research activities.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to visit the official website of IIM Bangalore for more information.
